programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programs.title: Surf Patrol
programs.desc: A young lifesaver must save an elderly man in treacherous surf, and a plague of bluebottles has lifesavers run off their feet.

programs.title: The Great Australian Doorstep
programs.desc: Spida takes you on a bucket list trip, starting in Broome heading through the Kimberley, including a scenic flight over the Bungle Bungles.

programs.title: Room For Improvement
programs.desc: The 'Room For Improvement' team have just two days and $7500 to transform an old store-room into a sensational indoor\outdoor entertainment area.

programs.title: Escape To The Country
programs.desc: Ginny Buckley helps a couple with a healthy 800,000 pound budget find a perfect country house in Devon with enough accommodation for visiting family.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.
